caption:
Run this test on your own business before you spend another dollar on ads.

Fill out your own website form. Call your own main line like a stranger would. Start a timer the moment you submit or hang up.

Only 17% of service businesses respond to a new lead within an hour. The ones who respond in under 5 minutes close nearly twice as many.

If your test ran past 5:00, you just found where revenue leaks out of your business every day. That lead didn't wait. They called the next name on the list.

The fix isn't another person watching the phone. It's routing every missed call and form fill into an instant text reply, sent before a human even sees it.

DM me "SPEED" and I'll send the 3-step setup we use to get every lead a response inside 5 minutes, automatically.
rationale: A 1-second hook and short punchy beats drive retention on reels, and this one hands the owner a self-audit they can run in the next five minutes instead of just a stat to scroll past.
